title: Sequence And Limit Shadow

solver_reuse.target: bounded sequence-tail and bad reciprocal-tail QF_LRA/Farkas regression seeds
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact finite replay computes the listed tail's maximum pair distance as 4/21 and the reciprocal value a_2 as 1/3, while malformed rows require a pairwise distance at least 1/2 or a strict tail distance below 1/4.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional sequence rows only when they add distinct bounded-tail, finite-prefix, recurrence, or exact-sum solver pressure; keep general convergence, Cauchy completeness, monotone convergence, and compactness theorems in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode bounded epsilon-tail and Cauchy-tail checks as deterministic LRA/NRA queries.
Replay finite sequence witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation.
Keep the bounded Cauchy-tail and bad reciprocal-tail UNSAT rows tied to source-linked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence for exact threshold contradictions.
Keep general convergence, completeness, and compactness theorems under Lean horizon until no-sorry Lean artifacts exist.
